title: Stalked
description: Stalked is a simple little mod for 1.19.2 java. This mod adds a character named "Shadow man."
body:
Terrifies your game by adding a shadow man. Art by @asterope-here on pixilart .  

![shadowdude](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1126fccf26d11d705d82114c79739209ae5dce67.png)

The feature in this mod is:  

-A shadow man that stalks you from afar, waiting for his opportunity to strike and choke you to death.  

If you like horror mods, this mod is a good mod for you. I had a few jumpscare moments with this >:)

## WARNING!
This mod is currently very bland without much to it! When i get more storage on my pc, i'll try my best to make it scarier and more engaging! Thank you for trying out the mod.
